children.name: Title
children.characters:
I help you make better decisions throughout your day. 
Just tell me what’s going on.

children.name: Title
children.characters: I missed a meal. How do I adjust?

children.name: Title
children.characters:
🧠 What’s happening

After a hard session, appetite can drop due to fatigue and stress.

⚡ What to do

Start with smaller, easy-to-digest meals and include liquid calories if needed.

🧠 Why

Your body still needs fuel for recovery, even if hunger is low.

🔄 Optional

Try smoothies, yogurt, or lighter carb sources.
